data.title: ECB’s Pereira Says Economic Damage of Iran War Has Yet to Show
data.description: The Iran war is still too fresh to grasp its full impact on the euro-zone economy, according to European Central Bank Governing Council member Alvaro Santos Pereira.
data.keywords: European Central Bank,Alvaro Santos Pereira,Iran,War,Economic Growth,European Economy,inflation,Europe,Washington,Middle East,economics,markets
